channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Makinde Wins APM Presidential Ticket, Outlines Security and Economic Reform Plans for 2027
item.description: Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, don emerge as the presidential candidate of the Allied People’s Movement (APM) for the 2027 general elections after the party primary wey happen for Ibadan. As he acc...

item.title: Tribute to Bashir Badr: Modern Urdu Poetry and Its Connection with Everyday Life
item.description: On 28th May 2026, Bashir Badr, one of the last great progenitors of modern Urdu poetry, passed away, leaving a profound legacy. Celebrated for his ability to combine emotional honesty with language th...

item.title: Amy Gertner Responds to Media Coverage of Her Husband's Sexting Scandal
item.description: Amy Gertner, wife of Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner from Maine, publicly addressed the media attention surrounding her husband's sexting scandal. In a video released by Platner's campaign,...

item.title: England World Cup squad to base in Kansas amid tornado season as US congresswoman criticises FIFA ticket pricing
item.description: England’s national football team is set to stay in the US state of Kansas during the upcoming World Cup, basing themselves in an area commonly referred to as ‘tornado alley’. The squad will be accommo...

item.title: Donald Trump showcases White House ballroom construction site and suggests it will host future inaugurations
item.description: President Donald Trump has appeared in a televised interview with his daughter-in-law, Lara Trump, during which he gave her a tour of the ongoing construction site for a planned White House ballroom. ...

item.title: David Schwimmer and David Beckham attend Champions League final as PSG defeat Arsenal
item.description: The Champions League final in Budapest attracted a host of celebrity attendees, including actor David Schwimmer and former footballer David Beckham, as Paris Saint-Germain faced Arsenal in a closely c...

item.title: PSG celebrate Champions League win as players’ partners join pitch celebrations while Arsenal return to London after defeat
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain celebrated their Champions League triumph after defeating Arsenal on penalties in a tense final held in Budapest, securing a second consecutive European title. Following the victor...

item.title: Springbok Women’s Sevens beaten by Fiji in Valladolid, face difficult SVNS promotion challenge
item.description: The Springbok Women’s Sevens suffered a 17-12 defeat to Fiji in their final Pool B match at the Valladolid Sevens in Spain, leaving their hopes of progressing in the SVNS World Championship hanging by...

item.title: China Introduces Temporary Travel Restrictions on DR Congo Over Health Concerns
item.description: China has introduced temporary travel restrictions targeting passengers arriving from the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC), as part of its precautionary measures on international public health. Auth...

item.title: Peter Obi Unveils Comprehensive Plan for Nigeria’s Development Ahead of 2027 Election
item.description: Peter Obi, the presidential candidate for the Nigerian Democratic Coalition (NDC), don show im serious plan for national renewal after him accept di party presidential nomination for Abuja. For him ac...

item.title: Palm Springs event aims for Guinness World Record with Marilyn Monroe impersonators
item.description: A large gathering of Marilyn Monroe look-alikes is set to take place in downtown Palm Springs, California, as part of an effort to set a new Guinness World Record. Organized by Greater Palm Springs Pr...

item.title: Orioles rally with five-run ninth inning to defeat Blue Jays 6–5
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles staged a dramatic late comeback on Saturday, scoring five runs in the ninth inning to defeat the Toronto Blue Jays 6–5. The win snapped Toronto’s four-game winning streak and pre...

item.title: A non-clickbait, descriptive title based on the article content
item.description: A rewritten summary of 200–500 words highlighting the essential points, written in Indian English and capturing the context, stakeholders, chronology, and implications without sensationalism.

item.title: Several people hospitalised following multiple stabbing incidents in Queensland
item.description: Queensland police responded to a series of stabbing incidents across the state on Saturday night, resulting in multiple hospitalisations. In Cannon Hill, Brisbane, a man suffered life-threatening ches...

item.title: Study suggests melatonin may enhance DNA repair in night shift workers
item.description: A recent small clinical trial suggests that melatonin supplementation may help improve the body’s ability to repair oxidative DNA damage in night shift workers. The study, published in Occupational & ...

item.title: Luis Enrique Celebrates PSG's Consecutive Champions League Victory
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) has successfully defended their UEFA Champions League title, marking a historic achievement for the club. Luis Enrique, the team's head coach, expressed immense pride, statin...

item.title: NNPP to skip 2027 presidential race, seeks alliances with other parties
item.description: The New Nigeria People’s Party (NNPP) has announced that it will not present a presidential candidate for the 2027 general election. Instead, the party says it is open to forming alliances with other ...

item.title: Allahabad High Court rules juvenile conviction cannot be used to deny passport application
item.description: The Allahabad High Court has ruled that a criminal conviction recorded when a person was a minor cannot be treated as a legal barrier to the issuance of a passport. The court emphasised the rehabilita...

item.title: Former safeguarding minister highlights rise in sexual offences committed by children
item.description: Former safeguarding minister Jess Phillips has issued a warning over the increasing prevalence of sexual offences committed by children, noting that the average age of child-on-child rapists is now ju...

item.title: Stormers overpower Cardiff to reach URC semi-finals
item.description: The Stormers produced a dominant all-round performance at Cape Town Stadium to defeat Cardiff 44-21 and book their place in the United Rugby Championship semi-finals. After leading 21-7 at half-time, ...
